message.content: migrate auth from session cookies to JWT — replace the cookie-based session with JWT-based stateless auth

content.text:
Plan:

1. Add a JWT verification middleware at src/middleware/jwtAuth.ts that reads the Authorization header, verifies the signature, and attaches req.user.
2. Update src/api/login.ts to issue a signed JWT in the response body on successful login.
3. Keep src/middleware/session.ts active in the middleware chain to preserve existing user sessions during the transition.
4. Remove src/middleware/session.ts and delete all session-cookie code paths, including the sessionStore dependency.
5. Update the client to read the JWT from the login response and send it in the Authorization header on subsequent requests.

This migrates the auth model in one pass without breaking existing users.
